requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety, EMC and Radio Type Approval (no CE) — Botswana
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全、EMC与无线电型号核准（无CE）——博茨瓦纳
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全、EMC與無線電型號核准（無CE）——波札那

summary.en: Botswana does NOT use the EU CE marking. For a battery product with mains charging or electronics, electrical-safety and （where applicable） EMC expectations are met through BOS-adopted IEC/SANS standards under BOBS conformity assessment, supported by the BOS import mark where the product falls under a compulsory specification. Botswana's grid is 230 V, 50 Hz （same 50 Hz as China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V）, so chargers/adaptors must be rated for 230 V 50 Hz and use a Botswana-accepted plug type. Any product with wireless functionality （Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, RF wireless charging） additionally requires radio type approval from BOCRA （Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority） before it can be lawfully sold or operated.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳不使用欧盟CE标志。对于带市电充电或电子元件的电池产品，电气安全和（适用时）EMC要求通过BOS采纳的IEC/SANS标准在BOBS合格评定下满足，并在产品属强制规范范围时以BOS进口标志支持。博茨瓦纳电网为230V、50Hz（与中国同为50Hz；标称电压不同于中国的220/380V），因此充电器/适配器须按230V、50Hz额定并使用博茨瓦纳认可的插头型式。任何带无线功能（蓝牙、Wi-Fi、射频无线充电）的产品，还须在合法销售或使用前取得BOCRA（博茨瓦纳通信监管局）的无线电型号核准。
summary.zht: 波札那不使用歐盟CE標誌。對於帶市電充電或電子元件的電池產品，電氣安全和（適用時）EMC要求透過BOS採納的IEC/SANS標準在BOBS合格評定下滿足，並在產品屬強制規範範圍時以BOS進口標誌支持。波札那電網為230V、50Hz（與中國同為50Hz；標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380V），因此充電器/適配器須按230V、50Hz額定並使用波札那認可的插頭型式。任何帶無線功能（藍牙、Wi-Fi、射頻無線充電）的產品，還須在合法銷售或使用前取得BOCRA（波札那通信監管局）的無線電型號核准。

standards_or_laws: BOS-adopted IEC/SANS electrical-safety and EMC standards (via BOBS compulsory specification, where in scope)
Communications Regulatory Authority Act (Botswana) — BOCRA radio type approval for wireless/RF equipment
230 V / 50 Hz grid — charger/adaptor rating and Botswana-accepted plug type

summary.en: In China, electrical safety and EMC for electronic products and chargers are addressed through GB standards and, where catalogue-listed, CCC certification; radio equipment requires an SRRC type-approval （Type Approval Certificate） from the radio regulator. Chinese products are designed for 220 V / 50 Hz with GB-standard plugs. A CCC certificate and SRRC approval prove Chinese conformity but carry no legal effect in Botswana: there is no mutual recognition, the plug/voltage rating differs, and BOCRA radio approval and BOBS conformity are separate national processes.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子产品和充电器的电气安全与EMC通过GB标准实现，目录内产品须CCC认证；无线电设备须取得无线电管理机构的SRRC型号核准（型号核准证）。中国产品按220V/50Hz及GB标准插头设计。CCC证书和SRRC核准证明中国符合性，但在博茨瓦纳无法律效力：不存在互认，插头/电压额定不同，BOCRA无线电核准与BOBS合格评定是独立的国家流程。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子產品和充電器的電氣安全與EMC透過GB標準實現，目錄內產品須CCC認證；無線電設備須取得無線電管理機構的SRRC型號核准（型號核准證）。中國產品按220V/50Hz及GB標準插頭設計。CCC證書和SRRC核准證明中國符合性，但在波札那無法律效力：不存在互認，插頭/電壓額定不同，BOCRA無線電核准與BOBS合格評定是獨立的國家流程。

standards_or_laws: GB electrical-safety / EMC standards + CCC (China Compulsory Certification) where catalogue-listed
SRRC Type Approval Certificate — radio/wireless equipment (China)

gap.en: Key gaps: (1) CE marking and the EU EMC/LVD route do not apply — Botswana works through BOBS conformity to BOS-adopted IEC/SANS standards; (2) chargers/adaptors must be rated 230 V 50 Hz with a Botswana-accepted plug, not the China 220/380 V / GB-plug configuration; (3) Chinese SRRC radio approval has no effect — wireless features need a separate BOCRA type approval; (4) where the product is in a BOBS compulsory specification, the BOS import mark and an accredited test report (preferably IECEE CB) are needed. CCC/SRRC documents support engineering analysis but do not establish Botswana market access.
gap.zh: 主要差距：（1）CE标志及欧盟EMC/LVD路径不适用——博茨瓦纳通过BOBS对BOS采纳的IEC/SANS标准进行合格评定；（2）充电器/适配器须按230V、50Hz额定并使用博茨瓦纳认可插头，而非中国220/380V及GB插头配置；（3）中国SRRC无线电核准无效——无线功能需单独的BOCRA型号核准；（4）产品属BOBS强制规范范围时，需BOS进口标志及认可实验室检测报告（最好为IECEE CB）。CCC/SRRC文件可支持工程分析，但不构成博茨瓦纳市场准入。
gap.zht: 主要差距：（1）CE標誌及歐盟EMC/LVD路徑不適用——波札那透過BOBS對BOS採納的IEC/SANS標準進行合格評定；（2）充電器/適配器須按230V、50Hz額定並使用波札那認可插頭，而非中國220/380V及GB插頭配置；（3）中國SRRC無線電核准無效——無線功能需單獨的BOCRA型號核准；（4）產品屬BOBS強制規範範圍時，需BOS進口標誌及認可實驗室檢測報告（最好為IECEE CB）。CCC/SRRC文件可支持工程分析，但不構成波札那市場准入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — BOBS conformity (BOS-adopted IEC/SANS electrical-safety/EMC) for regulated electrical products; BOCRA radio type approval mandatory for any wireless/RF feature; no CE marking
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC where catalogue-listed; SRRC type approval mandatory for radio/wireless equipment sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana does not use CE marking; electrical safety and EMC are handled via BOBS conformity to BOS-adopted IEC/SANS standards, and wireless features require BOCRA radio type approval. Chargers must suit 230 V 50 Hz and a Botswana-accepted plug. Chinese CCC and SRRC approvals do not transfer to Botswana, so exporters should plan BOBS conformity and, where applicable, BOCRA type approval directly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳不使用CE标志；电气安全和EMC通过BOBS对BOS采纳的IEC/SANS标准合格评定处理，无线功能须取得BOCRA无线电型号核准。充电器须适配230V、50Hz及博茨瓦纳认可插头。中国CCC与SRRC核准不能转用于博茨瓦纳，因此出口商应直接规划BOBS合格评定及（适用时）BOCRA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那不使用CE標誌；電氣安全和EMC透過BOBS對BOS採納的IEC/SANS標準合格評定處理，無線功能須取得BOCRA無線電型號核准。充電器須適配230V、50Hz及波札那認可插頭。中國CCC與SRRC核准不能轉用於波札那，因此出口商應直接規劃BOBS合格評定及（適用時）BOCRA型號核准。
